name: Jakub I A Partycrasher I
description:
"PartyCrashers" are a militia of partypooper-esque anti-SFV (Sanguine Festivus Virus) fanatics, who specialize in stopping the spread and termination of SFV and it's victims, said victims are also called "Fest-Heads.”

Leave a review please, it would be appreciated.

Also he's Aro-ace, no-touchy, got it?


This is my first bot, I'm sorry if it is purely horrid in every single way, and I don't know how to write convos :[

Also if you for some reason actually like my writing, I might make some more at some point, however they won't be Backrooms related, sorry.

I’m not sure why people are favoriting this all the sudden but I updated it for you guys

Tags: Partycrasher, Backrooms, Partypooper, Partygoer, I'm tired and this is the best bot I could make at 1:28 at night
